---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new command, agent, or improvement to an existing one
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What you want

A clear description of the command, agent, or improvement you have in mind.

## Who it helps

Who would use this? (e.g., OSINT analysts, law enforcement, developers, content creators)

## How it should work

Describe the intended behavior. How would you invoke it? What should it produce?

## Why it belongs here

This repo focuses on practical, general-purpose Claude Code skills. Explain why this fits that framing (or why it should be an exception).

## Anything else

Links to related work, prior art, or examples that inspired the idea.
